problem: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants?
mechanism: Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix
hypothesis: The key to What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants? is Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix — specifically Carbon nanotube alignment — which would help 700,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
